_meta.name: Layer 2 — Wild Corpus
_meta.purpose: Real-user-style query pairs that should/should-not cache-hit. Covers cases the engineer wouldn't think to add to a curated set — typos, slang, code-mixed languages, sarcasm, PII, etc.
_meta.selection: Curated to expose failure modes not anticipated during dev

cases.record_query: How do I install postgres on ubuntu
cases.lookup_query: How do i instaall postgres on ubunto
cases.rationale: Static embeddings don't normalize typos perfectly. Acceptable miss — better to re-route than serve wrong answer. Documented limitation; if becomes a problem in prod, swap Model2Vec → sentence-transformers.

cases.record_query: what is REST API
cases.lookup_query: WHAT IS REST API?
cases.rationale: Case differences should be normalized away

cases.record_query: how do I configure nginx as a reverse proxy
cases.lookup_query: hey google how do i configure nginx as a reverse proxy
cases.rationale: Voice-style prefix should not block similarity

cases.record_query: Como funciona machine learning
cases.lookup_query: como funciona machine learning?
cases.rationale: Same Spanish query, trailing punctuation only

cases.record_query: Como funciona machine learning
cases.lookup_query: How does machine learning work
cases.rationale: Different languages — even though semantically equivalent, Model2Vec embedding distance is large enough to miss (this is acceptable — we don't want cross-language cache leakage)

cases.record_query: How do I enable dark mode in vscode
cases.lookup_query: How do I get rid of dark mode in vscode
cases.rationale: 'get rid of' is a slang negation — guard should still catch

cases.record_query: What is JavaScript
cases.lookup_query: What's that horrible language JavaScript
cases.rationale: Sentiment varies but information need is the same. Acceptable as hit since same answer applies.

cases.record_query: Show me how to write a quicksort
cases.lookup_query: I'm preparing for a coding interview tomorrow and I really need to brush up on my algorithm fundamentals, specifically can you show me how to write a quicksort with proper handling of edge cases like duplicates?
cases.rationale: Way too much extra context — different query in practice

cases.record_query: Add user.smith@company.com to the access list
cases.lookup_query: Add jane.doe@company.com to the access list
cases.rationale: Both queries scrub to '<EMAIL>' → same template → hit

cases.record_query: Send a text to 555-123-4567 about the meeting
cases.lookup_query: Send a text to (555) 987-6543 about the meeting
cases.rationale: Different phone numbers but same template after scrubbing

cases.record_query: thank you so much
cases.lookup_query: thank you so much 🙏
cases.rationale: Emoji addition shouldn't break similarity (this query would hit Layer 0 first anyway)

cases.record_query: Can you explain what's at https://example.com/api/docs
cases.lookup_query: Can you explain what's at https://other-site.com/v2/api
cases.rationale: Different URLs but same question pattern

cases.record_query: Got TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable in my Python code
cases.lookup_query: Got TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not iterable in my Python code
cases.rationale: Different error types — different debugging path needed

cases.record_query: How do I order an Uber
cases.lookup_query: How do I book a cab
cases.rationale: Different services / verbs — Model2Vec similarity likely below threshold
Different function names = meaningful difference. Caller may want to discuss the rename. Acceptable miss; routing safety wins over recall.

cases.record_query: What is Python
cases.rationale: Empty query should not match anything

cases.record_query: Hi
cases.lookup_query: Hi.
cases.rationale: Trivial similarity — should hit

cases.record_query: How do I tune hyperparameters in XGBoost
cases.lookup_query: What's the airspeed velocity of an unladen swallow
cases.rationale: Completely unrelated — novelty should be high

cases.record_query: I've been getting bad headaches every afternoon for a week
cases.lookup_query: I keep getting really bad headaches every afternoon, been going on for like a week
cases.rationale: Same symptom report, more casual phrasing

cases.record_query: Should I take vitamin D supplements daily?
cases.lookup_query: Should I stop taking vitamin D supplements daily?
cases.rationale: Opposite recommendations (take vs stop)

cases.record_query: Side effects of Lipitor for cholesterol
cases.lookup_query: Side effects of Crestor for cholesterol
cases.rationale: Different drug names — each has its own side-effect profile

cases.record_query: Can my landlord enter my apartment without notice?
cases.lookup_query: Is it legal for my landlord to come into my apartment unannounced?
cases.rationale: Heavy rewording — Model2Vec sim ~0.6, acceptable miss. Routing through full pipeline is correct here.

cases.record_query: What's the statute of limitations for medical malpractice in California?
cases.lookup_query: What's the statute of limitations for medical malpractice in New York?
cases.rationale: Different states — different statutes

cases.record_query: Should I invest in an index fund or individual stocks?
cases.lookup_query: Are index funds better than picking individual stocks?
cases.rationale: Same comparison, phrased as direct vs alternative form

cases.record_query: Best ways to maximize my 401k contributions
cases.lookup_query: How do I withdraw from my 401k early without penalty
cases.rationale: Maximize vs withdraw early — opposite financial actions

cases.record_query: How long should I marinate steak?
cases.lookup_query: What's the right time to marinate a steak?
cases.rationale: Same marinating question reworded

cases.record_query: Best vegan substitute for eggs in baking
cases.lookup_query: Best gluten-free substitute for eggs in baking
cases.rationale: Same TYPE of question (egg substitute for dietary constraint). Layer 2 caches routing not answers — same model handles both. The LLM provides the constraint-specific recipe. Known limit on lowercase dietary nouns.

cases.record_query: How do I start running as a complete beginner?
cases.lookup_query: Beginner running tips — never run before
cases.rationale: Different sentence structure — Model2Vec sim ~0, acceptable miss

cases.record_query: Best exercises to build muscle
cases.lookup_query: Best exercises to lose muscle mass
cases.rationale: Build vs lose muscle — opposite goals

cases.record_query: What's the best month to visit Iceland for the northern lights?
cases.lookup_query: When should I go to Iceland to see the aurora borealis?
cases.rationale: Aurora/northern lights synonymy not captured by Model2Vec (sim ~0.53); acceptable miss — full pipeline gives same answer

cases.record_query: Do I need a visa to travel to Japan from the US?
cases.lookup_query: Do I need a visa to travel to Brazil from the US?
cases.rationale: Different destination — different visa rules

cases.record_query: Write a haiku about the ocean
cases.lookup_query: Compose a haiku about the sea
cases.rationale: Sea/ocean are synonymous in poetic context

cases.record_query: How do I tell my partner I want to break up?
cases.lookup_query: How do I end a relationship with my boyfriend?
cases.rationale: Different relationship terms (partner/boyfriend) + different verbs; sim ~0.57; acceptable miss

cases.record_query: How do I propose to my girlfriend?
cases.lookup_query: How do I break up with my girlfriend?
cases.rationale: Propose vs break up — opposite relationship trajectories

cases.record_query: My cat won't eat — what should I do?
cases.lookup_query: Cat refusing food, what to do?
cases.rationale: Heavy rephrasing (verbose to terse); sim ~0.64; acceptable miss

cases.record_query: Explain why the sky is blue to a kid
cases.lookup_query: Why is the sky blue — explain to a child
cases.rationale: Same child-friendly explanation request

cases.record_query: How do I unclog a kitchen sink without chemicals?
cases.lookup_query: Natural way to unclog kitchen sink drain
cases.rationale: Different sentence structure (without chemicals / natural way); sim ~0.0; acceptable miss

cases.record_query: How to install a ceiling fan myself
cases.lookup_query: How to remove a ceiling fan myself
cases.rationale: Install vs remove — opposite home-improvement tasks
